title: neodistemon
intro: Neodistemon calycinum, also known as the "yellow gentian", is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its bitter compounds, which have been used to stimulate digestion and relieve gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Neodistemon calycinum include its anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to soothe digestive tract inflammation and promote the healing of ulcers. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions with other medications.
